title: Assertion failure when querying a Blob column with order by DESC
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_blob (id Int32, data String, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_blob (id, data, description) VALUES (1, 'Sample Blob Data 1', 'First blob entry');
INSERT INTO test_blob (id, data, description) VALUES (2, 'Sample Blob Data 2', 'Second blob entry');
SELECT data FROM test_blob ORDER BY data DESC;
SELECT id, data FROM test_blob WHERE description IS NOT NULL ORDER BY description DESC;
key_bug_features: Querying Blob column with order by DESC
